---
name: New Filter Proposal
about: Propose a new filter for Marketplace listings
title: "[FILTER] "
labels: new-filter
---

## Filter Name

A short, descriptive name for the filter (e.g., "Minimum Seller Rating", "Exclude Dropshippers").

## Category

Which filter category does this belong to? (e.g., Price, Seller, Location, Listing Quality, Item Condition)

## What It Filters On

Describe what data or listing attribute this filter targets and how it determines matches.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen when this filter is active:
- **When enabled:** (e.g., listings without a price are hidden)
- **Default state:** (e.g., off by default, on by default)
- **User configuration:** (e.g., toggle, slider, text input, dropdown)

## Edge Cases

List any edge cases or tricky scenarios to consider:
-
-
-

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples of listings this would catch, or references here.
